title: Process Timeline: Interaction of alarm() and pause()
description: A timeline showing a process setting an alarm, going to sleep with pause(), and being woken up by the delivery of the SIGALRM signal.
relationships: Process calls alarm(5) to schedule SIGALRM in 5 seconds
Process then calls pause() to suspend itself, waiting for any signal
Kernel delivers the SIGALRM signal after the 5-second timer expires
The default action (or a custom handler) for SIGALRM executes
The signal handler returns, causing pause() to return, and the process resumes execution
